Full_Review: The breakfast was not as expected the bed some how small   the room was nice staff was friendly and the hotel is very clean Location is good where near to the good shopping mall and restaurants despite the fact it is a bit far to London central but it is manageable since it is near to the tube station
The fact that it was so expensive to book just because there was a football match on  Great location friendly staff and the room was very clean and comfortable
excellent location for our concert at Wembley such a comfortable bed pillows and slept really well and everything was great really good breakfast too
Parking was a bit difficult Lit up fire alarms were a pain when you re sleeping   Rooms were lovely particularly good shower Great for see gigs at Wembley
It s only the card getting blocked always nothing else big   Overall the staff locations service and most important the price was very reasonable The front desk staff was execelant

Breakfast is very expensive on top of the room price 16 a head for buffet style with no option offered for continental only Expensive if you only want a small breakfast Save your money and walk to one of the many restaurants ten minutes away   The location is fantastic for functions at Wembley Arena or a shopping weekend at the London Designer Outlet literally within 10 minutes walk We were also able to leave our luggage on check out and picked it up later

Really reaching to think of a negative The loo roll was a bit rough   Spotless room which was quiet fully controllable temperature great shower friendly staff excellent breakfast buffet with decent coffee proper kettle and hairdryer supplied Brilliant for gigs at the Arena
For a couple not really enough shower gel and shampoo one bottle of each between the two of us was not adequate   Requested a quiet room and was not disappointed

Nothing without being unnecessarily picky  All staff were excellent room spacious and clean with comfy bed and huge shower in bathroom breakfast was very good and all staff were helpful smiling and polite
Exorbitant price for breakfast and the sneaky thieving way a 10 tip was added onto drinks bought at the bar No receipt produced unless asked for   Location and ease of access to the tube

Cooked breakfast was cold and not the best that I have had and over priced considering the quality But saying that the overall stay was excellent   Dinner in the restaurant was excellent I would recommend the hotel

there is nothing that i could see that could have bettered the experience   it was an excellent experience staying at this hotel the hotel could not have been better located for the show that we had come to see and it was rounded off with an excellent breakfast in the morning

Ate dinner in hotel but quality of food disappointing Three adults sharing room but they had omitted to add extra set of towels robes cups and milk etc however this was quickly rectified with a call to reception   Staff helpful and friendly Room lovely Beds very comfortable Breakfast excellent Within short walking distance of underground station and Wembley Stadium Arena

The single beds weren t very wide and there was no mattress cover in the morning the sheet had come loose and the mattress was exposed   Very clean staff were friendly and the room was pretty spacious good location and was quiet

The bed wasn t so great I had a queen double bed but two single matteress s put together so sooner or later you sink into the centre without even realising Not a major problem but annoyed for what i had paid for the queen bed room   Staff were all so lovely What a fantastic location

The bed was a little too soft for my liking   This was a very clean and comfortable hotel The staff were very helpful and friendly The proximity to Wembley Stadium and Wembley Park Station make this an ideal location for both the stadium complex and travel to and from London

Staff was extremely polite and helpful After I had checked out I had to come back to the hotel for a few hours due to a cancelled flight They told me not to worry and Immediately they offered me a room free of charge till my next flight

the coffee was always cold but after speaking to a member of staff and asking for boiling hot the problem was solved  the room was very spacious and clean would use this hotel again although breakfast a bit pricey considering myself and my husband are not big eaters
Had a cooked breakfast the eggs were cold and sausages was cold to tea was good every thing else was good  Room was great shower was a bonus and very clean and we like extras in the room
N a  Everything Staff were extra helpful and polite bar staff was really nice The hotel is very clean and organised Everything was amazing Definitely coming back again

Bath would have been nice Romantic candles and glass of wine don t really work in a shower   Breakfast great Evening meal OK but limited choice Staff delightful Very near Wembly stadium Overall very satisfactory
I ordered food via room service the food was not value for money it was cold and tasteless and overpriced  The room overall was comfortable perfect bed and perfect space

The fact that contacted the hotel the day before check in to enquire about nearest parking site and was told parking was available onsite Turned up on day to be informed available parking had all been taken No offer made to resolve issue   New hotel so all facilities still in good nick Great if attending Wembley Stadium Not so great if not

On arrival receptionist was talking to a customer who was already booked out and left us waiting for a while I would have expected her to acknowledge us and excused the wait   Room was good quality for the price and very clean

No complaints very nice hotel for a decent price   Lovely room extremely well thought out design and layout The shower was large and powerful thoroughly enjoyed Especially appreciated the black out curtains was wonderful being able to have a lie in without interruption
No ironing facilities in the room and no sports channel in the room a guest have to get down to the bar to watch sports events is really bad  Location

I didn t experience everything that was available food in the evening or the gym but everything I did was good   A good choice of food at breakfast Accomadating staff and a clean and functional room Ideally situated for Wembley Stadium Events
The bar area was a lttle open to the restauant and open plan area Would may be nicer to have a more secluded bar area   The location was perfect for what my visit was planned for
The quality of the food at breakfast was fine but not up to the standard of everything else about this excellent hotel   The location the cleanliness the friendly helpful staff the value for money
This was our second visit and just as enjoyable as our first Everything about the Hotel is first class Great shopping at the outlets and lots of great places to eat Spoiled for choice
Update the toilet seat so it doesn t slam make sure there s enough robes for guests  Bed was extreamely comfy overall room was great a few things let it down but would stay again

Hour long wait for the room as it wasn t ready My daughter has been ill and has mobility issues We had planned the trip so she had enough time to rest from our journey and eat before going to Rays of Sunshine concert The hour wait in the foyer did spoil that sadly When we finally did get to the room there was still some rubbish in a bin and the bathroom could have been cleaner   Location great for SSE arena Suite was spacious Room service excellent prompt delivery of delicious food Sofa bed was made up ready and easy to fold out when needed
They could of gave us the room that was booked not a inferior one Breakfast was ok but by the time our coffee come we had long finished and ready to leave   Good location for transport
I hated the fact that when I booked the room I asked for early check in and when we got there we had to wait 1hr for the room to get clean and ready   The room service provided to us

nothing could have been better it was perfect   We liked how close to tube and Wembley arena and stadium easy run into London on tube and restaurant for evening meal was go food at fair price and breakfast was equal to ones had in lot more expensive hotels staff were very helpful and even printed out 241 vouchers for attractions for us would highly recommend and will be using again without a doubt thank you
expected bigger size for room  location very closed to Wembley park underground nice walking path at front of the stadium outlet market 10 minutes walk

Reception staff were excellent but staff at breakfast were not We came down to be seated and had to wait which we expected I counted 20 plus tables waiting to be cleared and overstretched staff who didn t seem to cope very well Food was barely warm and we had to ask twice for coffee and tea Staff were friendly enough but clearly stressed   Excellent location for the SSE

Complimentary beverages in the room were a little on the meagre side 2 mini milk pots per room although more could be ordered if required but when you ve made your tea you want it there and then and not have to wait for more milk   Modern hotel Room and bathroom spacious and immaculately clean Wembley Park station is 2 minutes away from hotel Central London is about 15 mins on Jubilee or Metropolitan Lines Breakfast good but in my opinion a little over priced at 16 45pp Would stay again if in the area
Staff on the bar busy and not overly friendly Also booked the room for 3 adults The room didn t have enough towels cups tea and coffee and glasses  Closeness to the arena

The restaurant needs improving We were going to have dinner at the hotel but it was too small and choices limited Ended up dining in a local restaurant outside the hotel Parking should be free for guests We were charged 15   The location and the cleasiness of the room Also the sound proofing is excellent We didn t hear the other guests or outside noises as we often do in other hotels The reception staff are very helpful and friendly The small gym and terrace gardens was a plus Overall a clean and modern hotel

Floor had marks on them Kept having problems with key to enter lift room Quite a few guests were experiencing this too   Staff friendliness Close to wembley stadium and underground Nice and contemporary hotel

I had sent in a special requirement 5 days before arrival where I wanted champagne and birthday cake to be in the room upon our arrival for my girlfriends birthday When we got to the hotel I was told the request had been read by the staff but they had not done it So I had to wait 20 minutes whilst they sorted this out and then checked in   Very good location with good access to tube lines
The double bed was two singles pushed together this made it uncomfortable and the sheet didn t quite fit the size of the two beds   The rooms felt very spacious
The glasses and mugs should be more clean  The staff are very polite and helpful if you have any issues or queries The bedding is clean and feels nice

The price charged for the room because it was the night of the Billy Joel concert was extortionate I appreciate I have a choice to book but my expectations were greater than the room that I was given I usually stay in the Hilton which I much prefer and feel that it is worth the money but unfortunately it was sold out the minute I had booked the tickets on the day of release The standard of the room for the price paid executive room was disproportionate but appreciate that when in demand they can charge what they like   The location is obviously great for Wembley the room was clean breakfast good and the staff were very nice

Stronger tea bags is all I can think of   The location to Wembley Stadium was excellent the hotel was spacious and airy and the rooms looked to have been recently refurbished to a high standard with a lovely contemporary feel staff were very polite and helpful and most of all cheery Breakfast was very good too with a wide choice system for breakfast worked very well with no queues Would not hesitate to use again and would certainly recommend

Limited car parking intercom at garage entrance didn t work even when phoned reception no one came to open gate had to go to reception leaving car by gate while sorted out entry card Had booked double bed got room with 2 very narrow singles Breakfast room service the following morning was cold   Location of hotel close to Wembley Stadium

Room was not ready until 5pm when we should have been able to check in at 2pm Severely understaffed in all areas The hotel was not able to deal with being fully booked Only 3 bar staff on Had to wait nearly 25 minutes to be seated for breakfast We were let into the room when housekeeping were still cleaning and were no where near finished 5pm to get into clean room is not acceptable
Breakfasts expensive considering there is eateries within walking distance   Brilliantly situated for wembley stadium Lovely staff Good value for money
It was a little pricey but you get a great hotel and great staff  The best bed iv ever slept in The breakfast was outstanding Will be staying here again

Prices of drinks and breakfast were high but I suppose that is to be expected in central London Wasn t too keen on the swing frosted glass doors to the bathroom  So close to the tube station and wembley arena Clean and comfortable and quite large room for London Room temperature was easily controlled
Our and our friends taxi drivers could not find the entrance to the hotel needs better signage   The staff were excellent and very helpful The food was really nice Room was spacious

Amazing stay especially if you there for matchday at Wembley Went for Barcelona vs Liverpool and with 90000 people around the hotel access was not an issue after the match we managed to get back to the hotel within 5 mins We received a room near a lift and the gym with a great view of the stadium for a sporting experience this hotel is value for money and a must Walking distance from food and shopping

We had two superior twin rooms for two nights with kettle fridge soft towels comfy bed and air con well worth the price Close to the tube use their car park and Wembley There are quite a few pubs and places to eat nearby if you intend not to venture far
Room a bit hot especially with heavy Donna Not enough milk for coffee Evening meal selection not great  Location for stadium brilliant Breakfeast great
Key cards stopped working to the room tv was also not working breakfast was extremely expensive an more bar staff is needed on an events weekend  The location the hotel was lovely
We arrived at 9am exhausted from an overnight transatlantic flight The man on reception arranged for us to check in early so that we could recover before meeting with family
House keeping staff needs to be able to communicate better with English speaking guests   Fantastic location Within 5 min walking distance of tube station and shopping mall

Nothing everything was perfect   The staff were extremely friendly and very quick to help us with anything we needed we enjoyed our stay immensely and as this was my first time in a Novotel hotel I will make sure I can find other Novotel s in other areas whenever I need to book a hotel It was a lovely experience and we had a great time
Breakfast let it down I wouldn t pay for that again   Surprisingly good for the location Didn t notice any outside noise Clean and large ish rooms for the price really helpful staff
House keeping was not optimum and one day we went back at night to find our door room lock preventing the door from closing so our room was open and nobody inside

Air con didn t work Beds were hard We had no bath and weren t told as we had just done a 100 mile bike ride Food for breakfast was cold and very limited as it wasn t being topped up regularly   Very little noise coming from the hotel

Would have been nice to have a pool No bath in the rooms No shower caps either   Lovely clean hotel that is very close to a tube station Nice food breakfast was delicious as were the other meals in the hotel but a limited menu Polite and helpful staff

Location is perfect if you are going to The Wembley Arena or SSE Arena This hotel is right by a tube station so could be a value for money alternative to staying in Central London This is a modern comfortable hotel with pleasant rooms

Stayed for one night because of a show at Wembley SSE Arena The room was clean comfortable The staff very friendly helpful The underground entrance is a 5 minute walk from the hotel which was very convenient

The additional costs for room services tray charge etc plus food drink is really pricey   It was my birthday during my stay and to be on the highest floor was absolutely breathtaking Would so recommend going on top floor again
Limited menu for evening meals More of a bar room service menu Minor moan though as food good and served quickly   Staff were very good Rooms clean and comfortable Breakfast excellent

Our key cards kept de activating so you be in the lift trying to get it to work or be outside your room and have to go back down and still might not work one staff member wasn t impressed and asked who booked the trip what relevance that had to get the card activated I don t know The bar was also a little small   Bed was very comfortable but a little small Excellent location to Wembley stadium Get off the tube and it is less than a 5 minute walk to the hotel Most staff were very nice and helpful I had requested early check in if possible had a early flight and needed to get changed shower etc and this was arranged to my delight
The location is great 2 min from the Tube The hotel is Fancy and very beutiful with new looking The breackfast was great and the stuff was wonderful

Housekeeping was disappointment for 5 days the same glasses and cups were just rinsed and placed back To enter the corridor on each floor the doors are inconvenient not practical if you have luggage stroller need a helping hand else it s a struggle Except the beer restaurant is over priced  A minute away from Wembley Park Station that is serviced by Jubilee and Metropolitan lines Less then 20 minutes to Central London Comfy rooms Friendly staff Nice restaurants nearby Spice of India definitely recommended

I didn t enjoy the fact that the actual quilt was dirty inside and I m slightly germaphobic about these things Also the tv didn t have a hdmi so we couldn t connect our laptop to watch films and there wasn t really much to do in the room   I liked the bathroom and the staff were very nice The location was good as we were just down the road from the shopping complex

Behavior of noisy tourists For reasons of hygiene and tranquility would be better like the rooms for tourists with pets should be allocated in a separate area  Place location good connections clean rooms with necessary facilities professional staff
Received a letter for a room Service charge that we didn t order We enquired about this and was Rectified  Clean room Nice bathroom safe in the room was handy

Bit of going backwards and forwards for the car park you had to run in reception to get the car park card then run back out to get to it had I been in my own I don t know where I would have left the car to have to run in to the hotel to get this   Great location for Wembley stadium We had our breakfast brought to our room was really lovely very tasty presentation was great there was so much of it

The bathrooms need more hooks to be able to hang clothes and other Items The Glass doors are annoying Key swiping at elevator is often frustrating   Fantastic locations to tube and shopping outlets Clean modern an reasonably priced
This place was perfect for us when we went to see Rihanna at wembly Short walk and plenty of things to do around Also parked was available for 15 a night which was worth it
A pool or spa would have been lovely   The bed was Amazing Fab Room 2 minute walk from train station and 2 min walk from Wembley Stadium Arena

Found two hairs in the shower Other than that no problem   The Hilton nearby doesn t offer free wifi This was my main reason for booking Novotel plus it s a little cheaper Overall this place is a better choice than the other hotels nearby

THREE MAJOR PROBLEMS There 2 Lifts Only one was working This was a MAJOR issues with so many bpeople staying ion the hotel at the time BUT no apology was given for the failure of the 2nd lift not notcei was put up to indicate that only 1 lift was working A lot of the other guests we spoken to in the lift comnplained about this situation The air conditioning in the room DID NOT WORK except to blow warm air the room was very stuffy and warm even thought the air outside was cool and breasy very pleasant outside like a sweat shop inside EXTREMELY POOR Because the windows only opn a few inches it was difficult to get a good airflow into the room VERY UNSATISFACTORY Breakfast because I did not book breakfast until the day we arrived I was charged approx 22 x 2 for 2 breakfasts approx 44 this is extortionate If we ever stay with you again we do visit Wembley for a couple of days each ocasion at least twice per year we will look for breakfast at MacDonalds across the way Premier Inn only charges I think between 9 and 13 for breakfast x 2 26 some approx 20 less that what we paid at Novotel and its GOOD breakfast only marginally less good in quality compared to Novotel Wembley   Comfortable bed Nice restaurant Excellent staff

key cards kept failing I had to get 4 cards the first day to get into my room Menu could have been a little more diverse  room clean pleasant staff good location to the tube which gives access to the major tourist sites without requiring a transfer

Since I was from other city and just wanna stay for a night It s quit far from London water loo station but easy to get there   Hotel s easy to find just couple minute from train station and it s quit near the airport The room was nice clean and comfy Staff was so helpful and friendly

More temporary guest parking availability would be nice for someone visiting a hotel guest Restaurant staff take a very long time for service   Very friendly staff Great location close to tube station and event venues Very clean and comfortable rooms I keep coming back

The breakfast in the hotel was really expensive 16 pounds for each but we didn t try it Also there was just tea bag daily   The location of the hotel was perfect A calm area with good surroundings a near by supermarket which is open till late hours and another bigger supermarket which is open till 10 pm A shopping mall is so close to it too There are many restaurants in less than 3 minutes walk just infront of the hotel and many of these restaurants provide halal food which is a very big advantage in this area Many other small supermarkets are close too from which you can get sim cards for mobile phones and top up your credits Moreover wimbley park underground station is about 3 minutes on foot and you can reach centre of London in about 20 minutes by the underground the tube The room size was really good compared with other hotels in London with tea facilities and minibar The room service was really great with good cleaning daily There is also a restaurant inside the hotel but we didn t try it
Couldn t find anything wrong   Good size room lovely clean bathroom comfy bed Staff very friendly and helpful Perfectly situated after attending a gig at Wembley stadium

Staff from the reception area very rude Room was not ready although we arrived very late in the evening Sofa bed was not done although it was obvious that it had to be done since we were 3 adults Called 2 times for the sofa bed someone came to make the bed after half an hour   Very close to Wembley Stadium
Perfect location for Wembley I took my daughter to see Coldplay and hadn t been to Wembley before so wasn t sure what to expect but the hotel was the perfect location V convenient and safe
The lifts a bit confusing no one explained them to us that you have to put your room card in the lift then press your floor number  Beds very comfy shower was lovely

The price was a bit excessive but there was a big event on so its probably to be expected   Big spacious room two comfy twin beds as requested great shower right next to Wembley which is great for after concerts or events

Only a small tube of shower gel and one of shampoo supplied in bathroom so if you just want to wash your hands take your pick A minor quibble not a big issue for one night   Stayed one night for an event at Wembley Stadium Perfect location for both Arena and Stadium Room with comfy beds small fridge tea and coffee facilities Big shower Small bar and caf at reception level Sainsbury s nearby and lots of dining options in the London Designer Outlet about 10mins walk away Wembley Park nearest tube Depending on the rate you get a good choice

Pillows are awful Toiletries are fairtrade but don t smell nice so not for me I m afraid I love my Molton Brown as they smell so good I feel a tad too expensive though I paid 225 for 1 night I feel 180 is about as high as price should go to   Location is excellent if you going to Wembley staff are friendly and welcoming Wifi is included which is great A call to housekeeping to replenish toiletries and there within 5 mins so that s great service Bathroom fitments are good quality don t feel like they are going to break easily like some hotels The hotel is very quiet in the evening even though there s a hustle bustle outside Modern and comfortable interior with great hanging space in room

Expensive drinks  Easy check in Arrived early but no problem getting room early Close to Wembley Park tube 2 mins walk Wembley Stadium 2 mins Room very modern clean Very comfortable bed great walk in shower Nice toiletries good selection tea coffee with biscuits

No car park for hotel   Room was excellent very clean and modern and the bed was fantastic and comfortable staff helpful and friendly and location is brilliant for Wembley stadium will use again when another event is at Wembley
The staff could barely speak or understand English Idea pure their best efforts it made simple situations a heck of a lot more difficult   Clean Well located if you re visiting Wembley

Staff friendly lovely modern hotel in an excellent location The only downside we found was that the beds especially the pull out and pillows were very uncomfortable so we didn t sleep as well as we had hoped

Breakfast We payed on arrival We paid higher than the of the morning payment Breakfast was very poor cold and limited selection We also felt ill afterwards Still not received copy of payment itemised bill by email   Location Clean Bijou Room

Only problem was the big increase in price on concert night but to be expected I suppose  The whole hotel was lovely we had a lovely stay staff were great and location for colplay at the stadium was perfect will definitely use again

Concerts mean this hotel has a captive audience so they can charge you through the nose and give very average service knowing full well that the client has very little choice but to comply The hotel has the potential to be very good but the reception staff and particularly the bar breakfast management was abysmal The hotel was full after the Springsteen concert so it is obvious that those clients will want a drink after a 3 and a half hour performance How many people did the hotel put on bar duty that night two The result was a 20 minute wait to get a drink with the hotel s own rude security guards not allowing guests to drink anything they had bought elsewhere even outside the front of the hotel same goes for breakfast a full hotel a stupidly narrow period for breakfast to be served finishing at 10am means guess what all the guests arrived for breakfast at 9 30am result Absolute mayhem with staff rushed off their feet queues food drink constantly running out and loads of people complaining The worst breakfast experience I have ever had in a hotel It s not rocket science the management need shooting terrible value for money  Location is great for Wembley station and stadium literally just a couple of minute walk to each

After 8 am cleaner came to my room without knocking my door with her key I had to woke up much more earlier then I want to be After an hour her manager came to my room using her key without knocking Bye bye rest This attitude is highly unacceptable in fours star hotel   Location wifi quality of the room
No additional door inside to soundproof the noise from the corridor Bouncy mattress not firm enough which resulted in back pain in the morning   Nice modern decor friendly staff Clean room

Nothing couldn t fault it   Perfect Location right outside Wembley food was delicious and we were still able to order at 10 30pm when we got back from the concert view from the room was lovely very comfortable everything was perfect

Rooms weren t ready on our arrival we had reserved queen rooms as we didn t have time to wait for our rooms we opted for twin rooms There was no reduction to the cost of the rooms which were very expensive   Superb comfortable rooms

Could have done with body lotion and a more powerful shower   Location Ease of check in out Cleanliness Spacious room Quiet Cost Comfy bed Access restricted to residents on gig night at Wembley so cool

that we couldn t adjust the air conditioning so we suffered all night with the heat Not enough tea bags or milk in the rooms   Wasn t really in the room long enough but was very nice cosy clean the bathroom was brill

Nothing particularly bad but saloon style glass bathroom doors with no lock are not so great in a twin room with a friend Air conditioning wouldn t go below 19 C   Situated on Olympic Way very convenient for Wembley Park tube station and great for the stadium No car park but there is a retail park on the opposite side of Olympic Way which we used for arrival luggage drop before parking in a nearby NCP Spacious well presented clean modern room Friendly reception staff and nice bar area
This is a modern and very nicely decoratd hotel with friendly staff The only downsides were the unjnspiring food and over hot bedrooms with poor air con Worth a look
There was no Iron and ironing board in the room where there has been in other Novotel hotels I have stayed in  The location was perfect for Wembley Stadium Very clean and comfortable

It was a bit expensive but ot was a treat for us so cost didn t matter   Location really close to Wembley stadium and Wembley Park tube Room spacious and clean with generously sizrd en suite Room service lovely food

Very very expensive breakfast Hardly any juice left Cold coffee   Amazing location So close to tube station and stadium Will stay again if we go to another concert great restaraunts and shops close by

I appreciate supply and demand principle but for just me and my 2 kids it was expensive Serving my chilled white wine in a plastic glass no   Location great Room was excellent for single mum and 2 teenagers Very clean Staff gave great service at check in
They were not aware of the second room I had booked after original booking not sure if that was booking com or Novotel Didn t like not having a proper glass in the bar  Excellent staff

so near Wembley this hotel should have been better at accommodating the huge amount of people arriving back at the hotel after a concert It was impossible to get even a drink when we returned to the hotel   Plenty of variety in the breakfast
Despite the staff being very busy they all remained polite and helpful This hotel is ideal if you are attending any event at Wembley The breakfast was also delicious with a wide range of choices

Shower caps in the room would be been helpful and not enough tea making facilities 1 teabag Only other negative was that there was no pool and breakfast was not included but that s just being fussy We had an excellent stay and will be returning   Style and cleanliness of the hotel Staff were very helpful and friendly Gym facilities were also very good

Basic customer service we were not informed or asked if we wanted breakfast Which for the price should be included I booked a double bed and got two singles luckily it didn t bother us   The location and cleanliness

Three in our party charged for three breakfasts although we only had two plus a chicken salad arrived without any chicken On both occasions we highlighted it but nothing was done I realise they were busy but   Ideal location

No account was made to deal with the number of guests that were staying at the hotel The wait for service was ridiculous Does the hotel not realise that it s near a venue which generates a large amount of business high occupancy leading to large numbers of people requiring service  Location and room

I didn t like the glass doors on the bathroom would have preferred a solid door There was also some building work going which woke us up at 7 45 Would have been nice to have been pre warned about the work given the cost of the room or given discount due to the distruption   Staff were very welcoming and friendly upon check in The room was very nice and spacious and the bed was really comfy

Lifts very busy but to be expected this time of year so was not overly bothered I used the stairs as only on the 3rd floor  Staff all friendly from check in staff housekeeping to outside security Everyone very accommodating
The bar was very busy and mostly from people who were not staying at the hotel leaving hotel guests to wait ages for drinks  New and clean rooms plus comfortable beds

The breakfast was very expensive so we ate elsewhere   Extremely comfortable with some added luxuries Wonderful to be able to leave a concert at wembley stadium and be back at the hotel in a matter of minutes

The only complaint I have is the wifi was a bit weak and sometimes cut off I was trying to call my parents on Skype and it kept disconnecting But that is my ONLY complaint Everything else was honestly superb   I loved the staff You were all so nice and friendly The room was gorgeous and the facilites were amazing I will definitely come here if I travel to London again

Ordered lunch at restaurant to be told an hour later that the food delivery van had not been that morning and was unable to offer us any food of the menu why did the staff let us order it and take them so long to inform us   Bed comfy
2nd morning breakfast service was slow and not as good as day one lack of food plates etc   The room was lovely We were very close to where we wanted to be Staff were very helpful

Nothing   Our rooms were Ready early and although hasn t specifically requested it this was hugely beneficial Also they placed both my room bookings next to each other and again this was very much appreciated Great customer service all round
Unanle to go straight to hotel after concert due to crowd control outside Wembley but this was outside the control of hotel staff  Helpful friendly staff

Room was not ready at check in time This caused us to be late for the event we were attending Poor considering the price and type of hotel Expected it to be better TV needed to be louder for me   Clean bedroom bathroom

Breakfast on second morning poor hardly any hot breakfast items scrambled egg looked green and wasn t replaced No bacon or yoghurts and this was at 10am   Excellent location friendly staff simple checkin process Clean spacious rooms with no noise levels

Wembley is just that it s part of the Wembley Park carry on remote from the heart of London but still a pleasant place and accessible from m25 and airports but its another journey to London  overall vibe was good and dinner was great
elevators were too small   Food for breakfast was very good Room layout also very good Right next to Wembley Park station Metropolitan and Jubilee lines
Breakfast was poor cold not all items available though they didn t charge for it after complaint  Fab location for Wembley Stadium Spacious room and excellent bathroom

The breakfast was exceptionally poor After waiting over 15 minutes for a table we waited a further 15 minutes or more for teas and coffees and that was after I chased down the waiter The cooked breakfast was just about edible we waited 10 minutes for the bacon to be cooked very poor The staff were polite in particular the gentleman who was front of house I visit and eat at the Novotel in Cardiff on a very regular basis and the food is far superior to the food served at your hotel   Very comfortable bed and pillows
Breakfast poor and overpriced queues food being left off order after paying for it at bar rude overworked staff poor management  Location for stadium

We stayed at the hotel as we were at Wembley for the Bruce Springsteen concert the hotel could have more staff in the bar and restaurant area as there were long queues for the bar on the event day  Friendly and efficient staff Comfortable Great location for Wembley Stadium

Very expensive Food inexpensive but very basic bar food Bathroom had a glass door that didn t shut No privacy at all Mirror over sink was placed so high I couldn t see myself in it Very basic room for the price  Excellent friendly staff Very close to Wembley Stadium

shower was very weak room 1009 and we were allocated a room for disabled which we did not like also seemed to have lost our original 2nd room booking so our colleague was on a different floor level   location excellent

Some staff were friendly but on the whole they seemed pretty indifferent towards customers  Perfect location between the station and the stadium Breakfast was delicious and loads of choice Room was lovely and spotlessly clean Would definitely book again
Really poor availability of food at breakfast No orange juice awaiting a delivery No pancakes Had to wait 20 minutes for bacon Ruined our stay

Not too keen on glass doors leading to bathroom which don t close lock   Check in was earlier than anticipated Staff were friendly Clean everywhere In good state of repair Room lovely Bed very comfortable Shower large Check out quick
room service guy nearly broke his neck trying to look into bathroom while my partner took a shower   meal we ordered in room wasn t very good ordered carbanara which was very dry
Could not understand the staff on the reception and they could not understand us given wrong information about breakfast  The location the food the bar facilities the room

BREAKFAST VERY POOR WAITED 10 MINS FOR 2 FRIED EGGS NO HASH BROWNS BEANS COLD CHEAP INGREDIANTS COST 16 95 PER HEAD COMPLAINED TO MANAGER AND WAS OFFERED A REFUND BUT AS YET NOT HAD THE REFUND CREDITED TO OUR ACCOUNT BAR SNACKS ALSO VERY EXPENSIVE NOT IMPRESSED   LOCATION PERFECT FOR OUR WEMBLEY VISIT

I had asked for a quiet room as I am a very light sleeper and was given a back room facing the inner stone square which was lovely and quiet for all but the last night of my stay As bad luck had it that s when the next door neighbor decided to throw a dancing party Until then I wasn t aware that my bathroom wall marked the limit of the hotel and that the next apartment belonged to a regular Paris old building no isolation In retrospect it seems safer to ask for a room facing the street which isn t very noisy to begin with   The Relais Medicis is a lovely cozy little hotel in the best imaginable location in Paris It is right next to the Luxembourg Garden to the Odeon theatre surrounded by lovely art galleries and numerous restaurants and boutiques The hotel lobby is very welcoming and charming the staff is wonderful and the room quite big by Paris standards well heated the bed was very comfortable It was well cleaned too Breakfast which can be had in the room next to the open window is your basic Paris chrome tray loaded with fresh croissant and baguette butter jams yogurt and delicious coffee Bathroom is separate from roomy WC both were very clean and comfortable I enjoyed my stay so much I extended it for an extra two nights

The historic decor is obviously intentional but the room and the facilities look and feel quite outdated not to say dilapidated The room and the bathroom were as small as you can expect them to be in Paris and everything is very basic with the exception of bathrobes The breakfast was thoroughly pitiful in every respect if you can get a room with no meal plan I suggest you do   The location is as good as it gets Place d Odeon a short walk from the Odeon metro station that however has no escalators which is important if you have heavy luggage The front desk staff were nice and friendly and helpful even if you can get better dinner from your homework than from their recommendations

My room was not overlooking the street so it was really quiet To have a great sleep in a European city is not always easy to do I also liked the fact that I could walk everywhere 24 hr staff at the front desk was also appreciated and gave a sense of security

Full_Review: The towel warmer would have been excellent if it were colder during our stay it was not needed unfortunately there was no off switch and we had to call the front desk It was ajusted very quickly   Excellent neighborhood Warm charming and safe The hotel had an upscale feel and a reasonable rate Staff was attentive and friendly they went out of the way to provide detailed metro walking directions and offered excellent feedback on area restaurants The private Spa access was a very nice complimentary benefit much needed after finishing a the 2017 Paris Marathon

Hotel_Name: Les Jardins De La Villa Spa
Full_Review: No negative comments  Needing to be in the Porte Maillot area I used to stay At the Hyatt or M ridien Always a disappointment not at 4 star level Les jardins de la Villa was a pleasant alternative A nice small hotel with personalized and friendly service An experience definitely to be repeated Very nice

Hotel_Name: Les Jardins De La Villa Spa
Full_Review: Breakfast was disappointing with very limited choice and not worth the 20 charge Eggs and bacon ran out an hour before the official end of breakfast time I mentioned this politely to a member of staff and asked if any more would be forthcoming He shrugged and replied non c est fini no it s finished and that was that Some of the hotel decor is over the top for my taste a lot of glitter but I accept this is a matter of personal taste and not a big deal for me Also I prefer a shower one can stand under without having to hold it theirs can only be fixed at waist height or hand held   A pleasant little hotel conveniently located not far from a main line Metro station Porte Maillot excellent restaurants and the Bois de Boulogne The room was not huge but very comfortable and clean Staff were friendly and helpful with one minor exception see below The hotel has spa facilities but we did not use these so cannot comment on them We enjoyed our stay there on the whole

Hotel_Name: Les Jardins De La Villa Spa
Full_Review: Would have been nice to have been able to make a cup of tea in our room There was free tea and coffee available in the reception except during breakfast hours which is when we like our morning cup of tea Minor point   The hotel was well decorated the rooms were lovely and well thought out and the staff working on reception were very friendly very helpful showing us on a map how to get to places and made excellent recommendations on where to eat and get cocktails

Hotel_Name: Les Jardins De La Villa Spa
Full_Review: The room was very small for an executive suite But I think the rooms in most Europe hotels are small we were out most of the day so this didn t bother us much   Great location Walking distance to l arch de triomph helpful and friendly staff Comfortable clean room Very nice washroom Nesspresso machine in the room with pods filled daily I loved that we got a tiny box of chocolates upon arrival

Hotel_Name: Les Jardins De La Villa Spa
Full_Review: Loved everything about the hotel   The proximity to restaurants stores the Metro station and tourist activities yet close to a Parisienne neighborhood Loved the spa which was included in the price steam shower and sauna Each concierge was extremely helpful in translating helping make calls to tour operators and booking restaurants Loved the in room cappuccino machines always present fresh coffee in the lobby and chocolates on the pillows Would highly recommend this hotel We ll stay here again when in Paris

Hotel_Name: Les Jardins De La Villa Spa
Full_Review: I would like to talk with travellers with head on their shoulders and feet really on the floor There are so many hotels in Paris but when you exclude the very expensive ones the big chains hotels not very exciting the bad ones then you have the good hotels good location reasonable price small good service We find one in Paris 17 LES JARDINS DE LA VILLA SPA Everything perfect starting with the manager STEPHANE une perle rare the receptionist NICOLAS he knows his job and he is doing it perfectly and all the remaining staff The decoration of the hotel itself and the rooms particularly is amazing Breakfast is very good and served in a very different manner than other hotels It s really the place to be in Paris mainly due to the location the calm little street proximity of main center of Paris very good restaurants around Room 22 was a very good choice but I guess all numbers will satisfy the most difficult Go there it s a very good choice

Hotel_Name: Les Jardins De La Villa Spa
Full_Review: Breakfast rather limited but perfectly adequate   Located where we wanted the ground floor is quirky and pleasant with a tiny but neat garden to justify the name The room was also pretty small but well equipped and comfortable great shower

Full_Review: Bathroom Shower had no rim on floor water spread throughout bath when showering Toilet was right in front of shower and your feet would get wet when you needed to use it Staff did not have the initiative that you would expect of a 4star hotel They would respond when asked though   Cleanliness Comfortable mattresses

Hotel_Name: Les Jardins De La Villa Spa
Full_Review: When sitting in the garden at night one couple were being quite loud in their room with the balcony doors open which made sitting in the garden with other guests uncomfortable This was not the fault of the hotel though but more other guests   The staff at Les Jardins were exceptional very welcoming professional and helpful They went above and beyond to facilitate any requests I had and were probably the best hotel staff I ve ever dealt with Upon checking in early they made it a priority to make sure my room was cleaned next so I could have the key to it asap The hotel is very clean has excellent facilities and is in a great location I really enjoyed my stay here and thoroughly recommend it to others

Hotel_Name: Les Jardins De La Villa Spa
Full_Review: The only thing I didn t like was other guests who didn t book the hamman and started using it during my booked time so I had to go and ask reception to handle it which they did immediately   The staff are very nice and helpful ensuring that you feel relaxed and comfortable The breakfast area is beautiful so tranquil a lovely place to sit and have a coffee and a croissant I like that there is a small garden space for good weather which again is tranquil or there is a lounge where you can have a glass of wine and relax in the evening The fitness centre and hamman is really great and everything is there for you that you will need robe fluffy towels slippers water they think of everything The products in the bedroom are very good quality and smell divine The bedrooms and decor are very very nice and there is always a bottle of water and chocolates offered in your room Location is great On line 1 metro which is 2 stops to champs Elysee and surrounded by lots of cafes restaurants including the famous Entrec te and a shopping centre I stay in a lot of hotels in Paris and this is by far the best because it has such a lovely energy which is no doubt down to the fantastic staff

Hotel_Name: Les Jardins De La Villa Spa
Full_Review: Honestly cannot think of a thing   The decor of this beautiful hotel isn t given justice by the photographs Lovely little touches wherever you look The finish is of high standard throughout Our room was a nice size I had been expecting small The bed was wonderfully comfortable and huge The shower room amazing never been in such a huge shower All in the room could not be faulted The staff were exceptionally friendly and helpful Location good and in an area of upmarket shops Easy access from metro Breakfast was nice more than just croissants fruit salad and yoghurt eggs and bacon Would love to visit again hope I get the opportunity

Hotel_Name: Warwick Paris Former Warwick Champs Elysees
Full_Review: The fact that the bathroom toilette is in a separate room than the main bathroom that has the washing basin and the bathtub which was not very practical or comfortable since you have to go from one room to another to wash your hands after using it If you are not staying with a close person this may become an issue especially if you are the kind who prefers to wash your hands before you pull up your pants Just joking LOL   Location location location first It is right off the famous Champs Elysee i e a minute away and a few steps to George V metro station which is directly connected to the bigger Charles De Gaule station which has the RER It is also close to a lot of very good restaurants and cafes including the famous Georges V with its tasty hot chocolate and desserts and shopping centers as Monoprix Zara H and M Sephora and great brands as Kenzo and Louis Vuitton The room size was good for a family of 3 We took the Executive room that had a queen sized bed that was comfortable in addition to a double sized sofa bed that can accomodate 2 We were shown the Junior suite which was bigger and had on top a small dinning table but it turned out to be a 100 euros more expensive per night and frankly did not think it was worth it especially since we were not planning to eat in the room The heating system worked very well which was a blessing since the temperature was around 1 C i e it was freezing The room had a very good sized closet an easy to use safe and a small fridge It had also a writing table and a chair and enough space for the lauggage The bathroom though was a little impractical since the toilette was in a separate room than the washing basin and the bathtub but the size was great and spacy and the magnifiying mirror was well located something of prime importance to me and my daughters to apply makeup easily The room lighting was good though it could be made better since you need to put each light on or off separately There was a little issue with the electricity sockets which were in impractical places and we had to go down to plug our phone chargers and i believe they should have been placed in a higher locations to give people easier access Also i realized unfortunately too late that the plugs located near the room entrance will shut down once the main corridor lamp is turned off i

Full_Review: Had asked for quiet room booked a deluxe king size room and was told it would be on one of the upper floors and over the garden i e Quiet On arrival told we had an upgrade to much larger room etc This was on floor 2 and over entrance on main road Was awake from 4 6am due to people loudly arguing outside and earlier traffic noise gave disturbed sleep Position of dining room in basement see what did you like comments On request was given a new room in terms of original booking which was very quiet on floor 4 overlooking garden Did feel that a day of our holiday was lost Was this a genuine upgrade or due to lack of available room as per booking Two electric bulbs not working hence poor lighting and bath plug didn t work hence no bath Sink plug didn t work but we repaired that Room size very adequate and comfortable which would have been enhanced by a second easy chair Turn down service a nice touch but why only on 3 nights A drawer on bedside table would be useful   Very comfortable bed and efficient air conditioning Excellent breakfast buffet Pleasant and efficient reception and foyer staff Very pleasant breakfast room on ground floor for our last breakfast

Hotel_Name: Warwick Paris Former Warwick Champs Elysees
Full_Review: We are usually traveling to Paris 2 3 times a year for business and leisure We have stayed in much smaller hotels typical of Paris too but our stay at Warwick was our worst ever stay in the last 18 years The name is too big for this hotel with Zero standard We were in a Deluxe room with extremely dirty curtains walls and bathroom The curtain walls and ceiling had dirt marks of insect killed on them that were not removed The phones in the room were not working The pop up blockers in bathtub and wash basin could not be opened but to be removed ON 4TH NIGHT MY WIFE WAS SCREAMING OF SEEING A COACKROACH IN THE BATHROOM We complained about hygiene and poor condition of room the next morning in the afternoon we noticed the cleaners had not properly vacuumed and cleaned the room and even intentionally left bunches of hairs on table wash basin and bed So rude Even scattered our slippers on the floor After our complain and opposition we were moved to an executive room which was a bit less outdated but strangely the cleaning and room maintain service was completely different In our 8 night stay we could finally sleep 2 night a bit comfortable The breakfast dishes are mostly dirty with food and oil stains This hotel is suffering of a serious hygiene issues I do not recommend this hotel to anyone expecting stay in a starred hotel It can be a cheap dirty hostel   The only positive point of this hotel is location although the homeless man sleeping off the street was also enjoying the same location as us but we paid Euro 220 nigh that he did not Good for him

Full_Review: Bathroom toiletries only for one person though it was clear there were two people in the room and nothing was replenished on the last day night We ran out of tissues and almost toilet rolls Check in very pleasant helpful receptionist but checkout was very different another receptionist left us for over five minutes deciding to deal with another customer who was a distance away from the reception area with his wife because he asked her a question about the contents of a box he was holding Meanwhile my credit card was being processed the amount was charged in the wrong currency I felt very concerned for the security of my card as during this long period while the receptionist was away I could not see my card and there were other customers hanging around the reception area On her return I expressed my concern and the currency error but her explanation was not satisfactory and to placate me she offered the hotel pen as I left which naturally I declined   Great location breakfast fair choice except scrambled eggs too runny for my taste Beds comfortable and well presented interior Tea and coffee making facilities everything clean and tidy in the room

Full_Review: The fact that the hotel stole 200 euros from us and have refused to answer our emails When we booked in we were told that the cost of the accommodation would be held plus 200 euros for any extra expenses If we paid on the same card when we checked out the 200 euros would go straight back in It did not and the full amount of 1 482 euros was kept even though we had a written quote for 1 280 euros for accommodation and did not use any other of the hotel facilities The cost was one of the reasons we chose the hotel in the first place Had we known they were going to keep the equivalent of another night s accommodation we would not have chosen them In spite of contacting both the hotel and booking com nothing has been done about it This is theft pure and simple and booking com as we booked through you you are resposible Also we were asked if we had any special requests We requested a quiet non smoking room and guess what We were put right next to the lift Great service I do intend to pursue getting our money back by whatever means possible I believe the Warwick is one of a chain of hotels and if we have to go straight to the top man we will   Nothing particularly

I have a loyalty membership card with Hyatt and upon my arrival the management left a kind note hand signed in my room welcoming me for my first time at the Paris Park Hyatt Not to mention they left a demi bottle of wine and a platter of fresh fruit wonderful The staff were very kind especially the staff managing the bar

No tea and coffee maker tea or coffee from the machine in the lobby was charged full restaurant price   Stylish interiors super bed very quiet Great shower Nice lobby and breakfast area All very new and well designed Good location close to metro Breakfast looked great although we did not book with breakfast

Nothing of note This is a small family run hotel with simple but well done facilities   Extremely friendly Quiet calm and tasteful small hotel in excellent position Simple but good breakfast elegantly presented

The hotel manager was not happy that we didn t want to eat breakfast in the hotel 15 Euro person it was our first day in Paris and we wanted to go out and explore and eat in a Parisian cafe We ended up eating breakfast there one morning because the manager basically told us we were rude for not eating breakfast there after they upgraded our room from Classic to Deluxe for our anniversary stay The Deluxe Room was quite small so I am sure the Classic Room would be even smaller For perspective there s just enough room to stand in the restroom between the shower and the toilet and the vanity sink is right next to the bed Our room faced the street which had several bars around it there were people talking yelling and laughing in the street until 0300 in the morning which made for difficult sleep I saw several people rate this as a 4 star hotel but this is not comparable to a USA 4 star hotel in my opinion   Lovely furnishings metro stations all around numerous bars and cafes within walking distance grocery store on the street corner umbrellas if needed during a rainy day Bastille Place and Bastille Opera House is about one mile away which is easily walkable or even easier by metro train If you re up for a 1 5 2 mile walk you can get to some absolutely incredible bread cheese wine chocolate and macaron shops

Breakfast was 15 EURO s for a section of pastries cheese and cold meats If you take a 2 minute walk you can get the same for 5 EURO s The room was very nice but there was no desk not great if you are travelling on business  The d cor and general feel about the hotel was great The owners have obviously put a lot of effort into this The location was good very close to the Metro and only a 5 minute walk form a decent choice of cafe s and restaurants The internal courtyard was a very nice peaceful place away from the busy city

We loved exploring the area a new neighborhood for us in Paris as we have not stayed in the 11th arrondissement previously We really liked that the neighborhood didn t feel heavily tourist it felt like a very residential area If someone has not pervasively been in Paris this may not be the ideal area to tour from although we found the transportation very easy from the hotel to everywhere we wanted to go the Louvre St Germain The Marais   The hotel is meticulously clean and well cared for The design is beautiful and the team there is absolutely lovely Liz was wonderful and allowed us to see different rooms so we understood the categories and all the rooms were absolutely perfectly designed and very functional We enjoyed breakfast at the hotel as well There is also a lovely outdoor area to relax in on nice days

Towels could be newer Bed linen also not as clean as one would like when we first opened it there were a few hairs around Breakfast could improve if serving natural juice not tropicana   The bed was very comfy and we slept very well Our room was on the 1st floor with view to the internal patio which made it very quite and it was a great size The breakfast was great lovely bread choice of fruit and the room they serve it is lovely with glass ceilings Cristina was extra helpful and super welcoming Location is also fantastic very close to the buzz os Marais many restaurant options Plus it is a 15min ride to Gard Du Nord
Bathroom was extremely small Room very small Breakfast was average Desk staff couldn t speak English so very hard to get any assistance   It was clean bed was comfortable

I picked this restaurant on the basis of two key points A bathtub and a good breakfast There is not a single bathtub in the entire hotel even though its advertised as such on booking com When I complained I was told by the check in desk that bath means shower and when I argued that she is incorrect she dismissed my point saying that she is right The breakfast was different cuts of ham which both my wife and I do not eat cheese selection breads and cereal No variation and no hot cooked items   Comfortable room at a good location The receptionist was describing the tourist spots for some customers and she seemed to give them excellent advice

Couldnt fault the hotel at all to be honest   Whole experience of the hotel was wonderful The staff were lovely Room and bed was great super comfy and spotless Very easy to relax in this hotel 100 precent would stay again Loved it

Was great no negatives   Fantastic rooms wonderful showers great location 3 mins walk from Metro and a great Metro line 4 stops to Gard Du Nord and 7 or 8 stops into the centre with no changes cheap supermarket nearby for water and snacks We also had inter connecting rooms which was great for our daughter to be close but not too close

The patio area is lovely but they have two rooms on level with the patio so you feel you have to talk in hush tones or not at all   Hotel was lovely very clean and lovely helpful staff easy to visit sites from This is a quite hotel no bar although you can order a drink and tea coffee available at a charge breakfast continental not a lot of choice though room was very spacious with matching decor and spotless the only fault with room was only 1 mirror in bathroom and no long mirror no good when you have two women fighting for mirror ha would definitely stay here again

Location was short walk from sights approx 15min from notredame but wasn t a problem for us may not be perfect for some other people but I would definitely stay again  Great room and accomodation and breakfast Friendly staff

Loved the breakfast and the cozyness of the decor The big rooms but most of all loved the way i was treated by the hotel staff They were extremely nice Very good service for the money It was always nice to come back from the busy Paris and have a quite place to relax
THE BED WAS AMAZING As was the coffee served by our friendly host at reception What helped a little was their understanding of English as well as our French was very basic

Rooms could have been slightly bigger but it worked well and we were extremely happy with our stay   We spent the weekend walking all over Paris and the hotel was perfectly situated from our perspective 30min walk from the Louvre and about 45mins to Montmartre on foot Lots of fantastic restaurants in the vicinity and we found one called L Epouvantail which we could not recommend highly enough about 15mins walk from the hotel near Place des Voges The hotel itself was small but very well presented Our room overlooked the central courtyard and was extremely quiet and we slept very well We also loved the fact that it was close to the canal which meant we could go running first thing before breakfast which was a continental affair only but with very good produce we loved it

Bedroom was small and maybe two bottles of water daily would be appreciated Breakfast could have been more extensive   Lovely bar breakfast area Very pretty place settings for breakfast Helpful staff Beautifully decorated

Went for New Years Lovely place cosy and beautiful lovely and very helpful lady at reception and same for the young gentleman in the evening could not say a single bad thing about the place or the staff had a lovely time

I booked this hotel as a present for my daughter and her boyfriend They were made to feel very welcome by the lovely staff The room was comfortable and clean and they loved the breakfast They were able to walk to do their sightseeing and found nice restaurants nearby Would highly recommend

Nothing   2 minute walk from the Oberkampf metro station and from there you can take all connecting metros around Paris which is Eur7 50 per day and another Eur1 90circa to Disneyland Room was super clean we couldn t complain Hotel staff were so polite nice and helpful I will go back in here in a heartbeat

I had a superior room but many things were missing like a big mirror a bedside table soap in the shower a bathtub a bin under the super tiny desk or a bottle opener It s way too expensive for what is really is And they charge 19 euros for a simple breakfast you don t even have eggs only one kind of bread pastries are not the best and fruits are limited The cheese and ham were delicious though   Very good quality bed and mattress very clean hotel nicely decorated and lovely location Very attentive and friendly hotel landlord
Everything was amazing Very nice rooms comfort and decor delicious breakfast very kind attentive and helpful owners and staff Also very cool neighborhood 11e arr Close to Canal St Martin and Marais

Hotel_Name: Best Western Plus Elys e Secret
Full_Review: Our room faced a small street and I was worried about street noise During the day yes honking cars trucks mainly traveling to local businesses At night it calmed down considerably The 2 twin beds room Boudoir was SMALL No drawers just some shelf space here and there We basically lived out of luggage the whole time irritated me at first but after a day I got used to it Good that there was an expandable luggage tray to make it easier and 2 plastic chairs to put stuff on Smaller rooms are common for hotels in a convenient location at a decent price in a touristy European location Simple but quaint view from 5th floor seeing terraces mini roof garden BUT opening windows during day just brought in hamburger smells from restaurant across the street not really ideal Teeny tiny sliver elevator seemed modern but SMALL It only comfortably holds 2 adults MAYBE 1 bigger carry on luggage or 1 adult 1 big checked in bag You get used to it Or you can take the carpeted spiralling stairway for daily up and down travel Interesting that there s a motif of Marie Antoinette on mirror inside if you look closely   Very helpful staff I can t thank them enough for their assistance mainly for advice and how best to navigate around Paris Since it was my first time in France I had multiple questions each day of my 10 day stay They answered politely and professionally in perfect English The manager Florian and his team and Lucille especially were very kind and patient despite having to work in a tiny little hub by the front door But that actually made it feel more personal approachable to me than a big front desk at a larger hotel ADDITIONAL GOOD STUFF Free soda water Beds were more on the firm side but not hard I prefer plush and these were still comfortable Mini fridge safe in room Stylishly decorated mirrors walls Google the hotel s recent remodeling the design firm that they hired it s intriguing The washroom was medium sized and very clean with interesting decorations style Breakfast was simple but tasty in small but cozy stone walled basement dining room Friendly cooks served mainly eggs done made to order with tasty soft cooked bacon or bland sausage links like mini hot dogs Great variety of coffee in espresso machine Also yogurt fresh breads croissants plain chocolate pound cake various tea bags milk orange juice peach apricot juice my favorite misc fruit spreads fresh fruit basket granola corn flakes oatmeal But I found out too late that direct booking via website gets you free breakfast reg 19 Euros a bit overpriced but still very convenient for similar room rate as through other sites Yet we were offered a discounted rate because we stayed longer 10 days and we agreed to pay breakfast up front for entire stay We didn t use it each day but it was still cheaper overall than full price In mid September it was chilly raining half of the time so it was worth the price for the convenience of not getting bundled up to go

The bathroom could have been a little bit more modern but this is a minor comment   Lovely decor in a great location in Paris and at a reasonable price

The room was small which made it difficult with luggage and trying to get dressed The cupboard was right near the door which was awkward if one person trying to get in the room or leave The tv remote was not working at times   Close to metro and buses There was a self serve laundry and supermarketband restaurants nearby The staff were very friendly and helpful

The only preference from our side would be to have a separate shower and not having to shower in the bath But this is just a minor detail   Very nice ambiance of the hotel had a nice feel to it Nice large room superior great bed and friendly staff Breakfast was nice Location very close to metro many restaurants in the area and quiet at night so one can have a good sleep

We didn t book breakfast with our room but we had it on the last morning I have to say it was a little disappointing Apart from that everything was excellent thank you very much   The service upon arrival was excellent and it really made all the difference to my stay
